Wera in Action

Here you can see and read about Wera’s activities in Parliament.

Wera is a strong speaker and advocates for a number of important causes and issues, about which she has an in-depth understanding.

Wera in action

Make Misogyny a Hate Crime

Violence against women and girls is growing, making misogyny a hate crime would be an important step to tackling this. When in opposition, Labour pledged…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Crack Down on Covert Filming

Women are being secretly filmed on nights out – often from low, suggestive angles when they are wearing skirts – with these videos then uploaded…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Energy Security Means Investing in Renewables

Trump’s war on Iran has sent global oil and gas prices spiralling, hitting already struggling households and businesses hard. It has clearly exposed the absurdity…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Stopping Social Media Drug Sales

Children are buying vapes laced with the dangerous drug spice through social media platforms. I have been campaigning for tech companies to be held accountable…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Challenging China's Aggression

In Parliament I pushed for the government to sanction those responsible for targeting pro- democracy Hong Kong campaigners living in the UK. Hong Kong authorities…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Preventing Eating Disorder Deaths

Far too many lives are being lost to eating disorders. These could, and should have been avoided with better early intervention and proper care. The…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Bath’s New SEND School

In Parliament, I called on the Government to urgently release the frozen funding for Bath’s new special school. Parents of children with special educational needs…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Tackling Online Abuse Against Women

Technology and social media  platforms are enabling new avenues to harass and abuse women online. In Parliament I urged action to fight this. New technology…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Standing Up To Trump

I called on the Government to call out Trump’s bullying and threatening behaviour towards the UK and EU over Greenland. Trump’s use of tariff threats…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Dementia question

After visiting dementia charity Remind UK I asked in Parliament for a statement from the Health Secretary letting us know when the Modern Service Framework…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Protecting our oceans

In Parliament, I have been pushing for the Government to do more to protect our oceans and marine ecosystems. A crucial first step is for…

CONTINUE READING
Wera in action

Betting at Bath Racecourse

When I visited Bath Racecourse I heard first-hand their concerns that the proposals to tax racecourse betting at the same rate as online gambling would…

CONTINUE READING

Wera Hobhouse has been the Liberal Democrat Member of Parliament for Bath since 2017. Wera introduced the Upskirting and Workers Protection Bills. Both have now passed into law. Since 2024 she has been on the Energy Security and Net Zero Select Committee, Chair of the Eating Disorders All Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) and Vice Chair of the Europe APPG.
